fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the over-receive policy.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the over-receive policy.

fields.name: Default
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the over-receipt code will be used by default.

fields.name: Over-Receipt Tolerance %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage by which the ordered quantity is allowed to be exceeded.

fields.name: Required Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies if over-receiving items with this over-receipt-code code must first be approved.
